div.head: The Chairman of the American Delegation (Davis) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 23. A plenary session today adopted quotas outlined in my No. 21, April 26, 5 p.m., and accepted accompanying report of Negotiating CommitteeProceedings and Documents of the Conference, p. 60. subject, however, to right to pass upon final statement in draft agreement of matters it covers.
Conference is not releasing quota figures or specific information regarding any of them.
We have changed text submitted to you in my No. 22, April 27, 8 p.m.,Not printed. and will transmit revised text after further discussion with Drafting Committee.
